title: Queens Public Library — Shared Definitions
description: Reusable JSON Schema definitions shared across Queens Public Library (QPL) object schemas. Reconciles fields common to the one QPL Open Data dataset (data.cityofnewyork.us — 'Queens Library Branches', agency label 'Queens Library (QBPL)'), the queenslibrary.org Drupal site, and the packaged SaaS platforms QPL runs on: the BiblioCommons catalog (queenslibrary.bibliocommons.com), Communico events (queens.libnet.info / connect.queenslibrary.org), and the OverDrive/Libby, Axis 360, and hoopla digital-lending silos. Includes the NYC geography spine, a shared BranchReference, and a Vendor enum naming the third-party platforms that own each surface.

Borough.description: NYC borough. QPL is the public library system for Queens, so branches are effectively all Queens; the full enum is kept as the shared NYC geography spine.

Geography.description: The NYC geography spine carried by the Queens Library Branches dataset — the join keys back to the rest of city government.

nta.description: Neighborhood Tabulation Area name or code ('NTA').

BranchReference.description: A reference to a QPL branch/location by name and identifiers.

branchId.description: Branch code/slug used by the site, catalog, or Communico (not published to Open Data).

Vendor.description: Third-party SaaS platform that owns the underlying surface. QPL is a nonprofit that composes its digital presence from packaged vendors; almost nothing is an owned QPL API.
